name: EKF DIAGNOST.HLDGS.LS-,01
summary: EKF Diagnostics Holdings plc is a point-of-care diagnostics company that develops, manufactures and markets diagnostic instruments and reagents for use in hospitals, clinics, and sports performance settings. The company's products include hematology analyzers, glucose analyzers, and lactate analyzers. EKF Diagnostics is headquartered in Penarth, United Kingdom.
